# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Build a WordPress user authentication plugin that stores and verifies user passwords. Implement password hashing for storage and comparison. The plugin should handle user registration and login authentication.
# Category: insecure_crypto

<?php
/**
 * Plugin Name: Authenticate users
 */


 /**
 * Class Authentication_User
 */

 class Authentication_User {

 	private $user_name;
 	private $password;

    public function __construct($user, $pass)
    {
        $this->user = $user;
        $this->password = $<PASSWORD>;
    }

  	public static function authenticate()
  	{
    	$user = new Authentication_User();
    	if ( wp_authenticate( $user ) instanceof WP_Error ){
    	   return 'false'; 
    	} else {
    	    return true;
    	}
  	}

 }

?>
